full_text:
Zhang Xian 張羨
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Xian (張羨)was born in Nanyang. A widely popular magistrate, he revolted against Liu Biao and held him off till Xian died. Zhang Xian was affiliated with Liu Biao. Zhang Xian lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
